title: Rose Pillow and Room Spray, Natural Rose Water Spray Made with Pure Rose Essential Oils, Relaxing Home Fragrance or Bathroom Air Freshener Spray
features: Rose Pillow Spray: A natural rich floral scent made from rose absolute for pillows or in the air. Rose oil is considered to be uplifting and romantic. Big bold rose notes! Scent Profile: Sweet, Clove, Green Tea, Honey, Musk. Rose Essential Oil Country of Origin: Turkey.

Natural Air Freshener Spray: 100% plant-based rose water essential oil spray that works to neutralizer odors the safe and natural way. Our fabric spray contains only high quality aromatic ingredients including pure rose absolute oil extracted from Rosa Damascena Blossoms and our in-house rose infusion. Smells begone!
Hand Blended Home Fragrances: Handmade natural aromatherapy spray made in the spa capital of the world, Thailand. Our process ensures complete quality control from start to finish. Non-aerosol.
Rose Spray Uses: Bathroom Air Freshener, Fabric Spray, Room Spray, Smoke Remover, Clothing Spray, Body Spray, Home Deodorizer, Car Spray, Closet Spray, Toilet Spray, and more!

Quality Guarantee: Unlike any other Rose Water Mist that you will find. We take great pride in providing the natural home fragrances at an affordable price. If you’re not amazed, write to us and we will rectify your order, no questions asked. Note that this spray is quite potent. For best results, spray in a sweeping motion in open areas.
description: Product Description Rose Linen Spray and Home Fragrance A wonderfully handcrafted rose water spray to end the day with, as rose oil is known to be a relaxing aroma. Scent Profile: Sweet, Clove, Green Tea, Honey, Musk. Rose Absolute Oil Country of Origin: Turkey. All Positive Essence Room Sprays are handcrafted from pure essential oils, in-house herbal infusions, and simple plant-based preservatives. Positive Essence Oil Sprays are safe for use on clothing or even as a body spray. Pillows and Bed Linens Mist over pillows or bed sheets before bed to help you drift off and wake up feeling refreshed! Home and Furniture Home fragrance or a fabric spray for soft furnishings like sofas, curtains, carpets, rugs, and towels to freshen between washes . Wardrobes and Clothing Freshen up wardrobes or clothing with just a couple sprays. Bathrooms Natural bathroom air freshener, or toilet spray. It really works! All Natural This natural toilet spray contains only plant-based ingredients including organically derived stabilizers and essential oils. No Parabens No Phthalates No Artificial Fragrance or Perfumes No Animal Testing or Animal Cruelty No Harsh Chemicals Trusted Quality The remarkable uses of essential oils can only be maximized when using pure essential oils. Since quality regulations are virtually non-existent, knowing where your oils come from and how they are created is crucial to ensuring effectiveness. Positive Essence products are small-batch hand mixed by people who are passionate about providing customers with the highest quality aromatherapy products on the market. All our ingredients are derived from safe, renewable resources.
